name: Noodle Cheese Kugel Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Melt the butter in a 9 x 13-inch baking pan that has been placed in the oven.
3. Cook noodles as directed and drain well. Pour noodles into the pan, covering the bottom completely.
4. Beat remaining ingredients for 30 minutes in an electric mixer set on the highest speed possible without causing the mixture to splash. (A food processor is not recommended.)
5. Pour the mixture over the noodles in the pan and bake for 1 hour or until the top is slightly golden in color.
6. If desired, this is the kugel to make!
7. Can also divide the recipe in half if using an 8-inch square pan. Freezes well.
